category_sources: source_facts.description says it modifies keymaps and pointer button mappings in X; official X.Org GitLab project is xorg/app/xmodmap.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmodmap; official X.Org GitLab project path is xorg/app/xmodmap.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official X.Org GitLab project; X.Org publishes current documentation/manpage collection at x.org/releases/current/doc/.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop.org GitLab source-control project for xmodmap.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify X keymap/pointer mapping utility; official X.Org project context supports X11/X.Org tags.
